Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of The Imposition Of Sanctions, Or, Alternative, For Relief Under Ccp Sec 473(B);
Off Calendar Jul-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Peninsula Yellow Cab Company's Motion for Reconsideration of Imposition of Sanctions issued on 5/26/2010 to Christophe M. Harnett, Esq., in the amount of $250.00 and Plaintiff's Joinder in Defendant's Motion for reconsideration of imposition of sanctions are heard this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion and joinder is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions to Plaintiff's and Defendant's Counsel are ordered vacated. Order signed. Proceedings not reported. (212)
